title: [BUG] datavalidation optimization
author: massimoliani
body:
## 🐛 Bug Report

I'm creating an xlsx file with 2 description row at beginning of merged cols.
Two rows, one with columns key and one with columns header.
From row 5 are all rows of data.
On one colum from 5 to 14 for example I add data validation as drop down box.

The final xml of xlsx as two data validation from 5 to 10 and from 5 to 15, but finally opening with mac Numbers of Libre Office the drop down box is only from 5 to 10. It look like the optimization process add two different data validation and excel take only the first one the 5 to 10.

Lib version: 4.4.0

## Steps To Reproduce

Make a worksheet with 2 description row of merged columns.
2 rows of id or header description.
then all other data rows and one column having data validation with drop down.
The optimizer of data validation model let he rendered xml having to validation tags one from 5 to 10 and the secondo 5 to last row.

## The expected behaviour:

As is a validation valid for all data cell in the same column I expect a single validation rule in the xml valid from first to last data row.

## Possible solution (optional, but very helpful):

Check the data validation optimization. Probably the sort on data rows isn't as expected as the cell is as text and C2 is greater than C10, C02 will be lower than C10.

comments.author: massimoliani
comments.body: To avoid the error in multiple data validation on same column, having an incorrect result from data validation optimiser is possible to use multiple cell data validation model as from this issue https://github.com/exceljs/exceljs/issues/2818 accessing data validation as worksheet as any.
